descriptionText: Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025| Guest Cabins:3| Crew Cabins:4If you are searching for a modern yacht that blends large‑yacht comfort with smart design, the Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025 is a strong option to consider. This 27‑metre model from Wally has attracted considerable interest for the way it redefines how space is used on a yacht of this size. The yacht available for sale is from the 2025 model year and is presented in good condition, offering a practical opportunity for an owner who values design efficiency, stability, and a contemporary onboard experience.yacht Main Specifications: • Brand: Wally • Year: 2025 • Length: 27 m • Max Beam: 7.66 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 2.1 m • Gross Tonnage: 200 GT • Yacht Location: [Available on request] • Max Speed: 23 knots • Fuel Tank: 12,000 l • Guest Cabins: 3 • Crew Cabins: 4 • Water Tank: 2,200 l • Engines: 4 x Volvo IPS 1250The Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025 is built on a wide‑body platform, which allows for generous interior volumes while maintaining the brand’s clean and purposeful exterior profile. One of the defining features of this model is the owner’s suite located forward on the main deck. Instead of a typical arrangement, this cabin spans the full beam and sits high at the bow, benefiting from impressive natural light and open views through large windows. The elevated position of the suite adds a sense of privacy while making the most of the yacht’s forward space.Moving through the main deck, tall glass surrounds the saloon, creating an uninterrupted connection with the environment. Whether at anchor or underway, the 270‑degree visibility gives the interior a calm and open atmosphere. The hull, designed by Laurent Giles and extensively tested, supports steady cruising and a semi‑displacement performance. Powered by four Volvo IPS 1250 engines, the yacht can reach speeds of up to 23 knots while maintaining predictable handling.The exterior layout is designed with practical use in mind. The teak decks guide you aft to the beach club area, which becomes a versatile zone for water activities or relaxation. Fold‑out wings extend the usable space, while a hydraulic platform provides direct access to the sea. Storage solutions are neatly integrated, with room for a tender and various water toys without interrupting the clean lines of the stern.Inside, the upper deck features Wally’s signature glass and carbon dome, a structural element that brings light into the space while maintaining strength. The central staircase, formed as a single piece of carbon, is both a functional and visual element, connecting all decks without dividing the interior with unnecessary bulkheads. On the lower deck, guests can enjoy a well‑planned layout with a VIP suite and additional guest cabins, all designed to provide comfortable stays during longer trips.Overall, the Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025 offers a balance of thoughtful design, stable performance, and spacious living areas. With the yacht in good condition, it represents an appealing choice for an owner who values both practicality and the forward‑thinking approach that Wally is known for.
descriptionHtml:
Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025| Guest Cabins:3| Crew Cabins:4

If you are searching for a modern yacht that blends large‑yacht comfort with smart design, the Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025 is a strong option to consider. This 27‑metre model from Wally has attracted considerable interest for the way it redefines how space is used on a yacht of this size. The yacht available for sale is from the 2025 model year and is presented in good condition, offering a practical opportunity for an owner who values design efficiency, stability, and a contemporary onboard experience.

yacht Main Specifications:
• Brand: Wally
• Year: 2025
• Length: 27 m
• Max Beam: 7.66 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 2.1 m
• Gross Tonnage: 200 GT
• Yacht Location: [Available on request]
• Max Speed: 23 knots
• Fuel Tank: 12,000 l
• Guest Cabins: 3
• Crew Cabins: 4
• Water Tank: 2,200 l
• Engines: 4 x Volvo IPS 1250

The Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025 is built on a wide‑body platform, which allows for generous interior volumes while maintaining the brand’s clean and purposeful exterior profile. One of the defining features of this model is the owner’s suite located forward on the main deck. Instead of a typical arrangement, this cabin spans the full beam and sits high at the bow, benefiting from impressive natural light and open views through large windows. The elevated position of the suite adds a sense of privacy while making the most of the yacht’s forward space.

Moving through the main deck, tall glass surrounds the saloon, creating an uninterrupted connection with the environment. Whether at anchor or underway, the 270‑degree visibility gives the interior a calm and open atmosphere. The hull, designed by Laurent Giles and extensively tested, supports steady cruising and a semi‑displacement performance. Powered by four Volvo IPS 1250 engines, the yacht can reach speeds of up to 23 knots while maintaining predictable handling.

The exterior layout is designed with practical use in mind. The teak decks guide you aft to the beach club area, which becomes a versatile zone for water activities or relaxation. Fold‑out wings extend the usable space, while a hydraulic platform provides direct access to the sea. Storage solutions are neatly integrated, with room for a tender and various water toys without interrupting the clean lines of the stern.

Inside, the upper deck features Wally’s signature glass and carbon dome, a structural element that brings light into the space while maintaining strength. The central staircase, formed as a single piece of carbon, is both a functional and visual element, connecting all decks without dividing the interior with unnecessary bulkheads. On the lower deck, guests can enjoy a well‑planned layout with a VIP suite and additional guest cabins, all designed to provide comfortable stays during longer trips.

Overall, the Wallywhy200 For Sale 2025 offers a balance of thoughtful design, stable performance, and spacious living areas. With the yacht in good condition, it represents an appealing choice for an owner who values both practicality and the forward‑thinking approach that Wally is known for.
